overrides.expect: \varepsilon_ {S, T} = \left\{ \begin{array}{c l} \prod_ {s \in S, t \in T} \varepsilon_ {s, t} & \text {if S\neq\varnothing , T\neq\varnothing} \\ 1 & \text {if S or T = \varnothing .} \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: \varepsilon_ {S, T} = \left\{ \begin{array}{c l} \prod_ {s \in S, t \in T} \varepsilon_ {s, t} & \text {if } S\neq\varnothing ,\ T\neq\varnothing \\ 1 & \text {if } S \text { or } T = \varnothing . \end{array} \right.

overrides.old: \( F\_4(t\_i; x, y)=F\_3(t\_i; x,G\_3(t\_i; x)y). This reduces the consideration to a single equation with no inequations for the various terms of the cover \( δ\_3.
overrides.new: F_4(t_i; x, y)=F_3(t_i; x,G_3(t_i; x)y).\ \text{This reduces the consideration to a single equation with no inequations for the various terms of the cover } \delta_3.

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \varphi (n) = \varphi (2 ^ {e _ {1}}) \varphi (p _ {2} ^ {e _ {2}}) \dots \varphi (p _ {s} ^ {e _ {s}}) \\ = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 2 ^ {e _ {1} - 1} p _ {2} ^ {e _ {2} - 1} (p _ {2} - 1) \dots p _ {s} ^ {e _ {s} - 1} (p _ {s} - 1) & \text {if e_{1} >0} \\ p _ {2} ^ {e _ {2} - 1} (p _ {2} - 1) \dots p _ {s} ^ {e _ {s} - 1} (p _ {s} - 1) & \text {if e_{1} = 0.} \end{array} \right. \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \varphi (n) = \varphi (2 ^ {e _ {1}}) \varphi (p _ {2} ^ {e _ {2}}) \dots \varphi (p _ {s} ^ {e _ {s}}) \\ = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 2 ^ {e _ {1} - 1} p _ {2} ^ {e _ {2} - 1} (p _ {2} - 1) \dots p _ {s} ^ {e _ {s} - 1} (p _ {s} - 1) & \text {if } e_{1} >0 \\ p _ {2} ^ {e _ {2} - 1} (p _ {2} - 1) \dots p _ {s} ^ {e _ {s} - 1} (p _ {s} - 1) & \text {if } e_{1} = 0. \end{array} \right. \end{array}
